products.intro: 奥切尔机械制造厂专注于石油开采设备和金属结构领域关键工业的设备与零部件制造。产品销往俄罗斯、独联体国家及海外，提供符合国际质量标准的产品。
products.outro: 奥切尔机械制造厂按 GOST 标准生产产品。所有产品均经过多重质量检验。每件产品都有助于提高生产现场的效率和安全性。

oilfield.title: 石油开采设备
oilfield.lead: OMZ 提供石油开采设备制造的综合解决方案：
items: Pump rods and couplings: the foundation for reliable pump equipment operation;
Centralizers and auto-couplers: ensure proper assembly and operation of all components;
Seals and rod rotators: effectively protect and control rod movement.

metalwork.title: 金属结构
metalwork.lead: 我们生产广泛应用于各领域的金属结构：
items: Structures for buildings and facilities: from small elements to large-scale projects;
Supports and frames for pipelines: essential for infrastructure safety and durability;
Supports for construction and reconstruction of road sections;

formwork.title: 模板配件
formwork.lead: 奥切尔机械制造厂生产的模板配件符合高质量和耐用性标准。
items: End anchors and tie screws: create strong connections between formwork elements, improving overall system reliability;
Three-wing nuts, wedge and rack locks: strengthen connections between structural components, ensuring stability and reliability during use;
Corner panels and reinforced univilkas for props: increase stability and strength of formwork structures for long-term use;

hero.title: ABOUT OMZ
hero.tagline: JSC Ocher Machine-Building Plant — more than two and a half centuries of industrial history and modern production technologies

intro.imageAlt: 奥切尔机械制造厂生产能力
intro.leadAfter: — one of the oldest industrial enterprises in the Urals, focused on foreign economic activity for trading, construction, and oilfield organizations. We support small, medium, and large businesses through reliable production of metal structures, oilfield equipment, and components.
intro.column2: Specialists at Ocher Machine-Building Plant are always ready to study and solve tasks of any complexity. They closely monitor innovative developments and anticipate risks in operating metal structures and oilfield equipment. They develop cost-efficient concepts for metrological supervision of equipment use and condition, reducing costs through measurement complexes, standards, and automated systems for testing and chemical, metallographic, and mechanical analysis of products and raw materials in compliance with GOST, API 11B, TU, and other industry standards.
intro.column3: A unified organization bringing together thousands of international and Russian specialists: analysts, engineers, auditors, system administrators, technologists, mechanics, designers, certified project managers, and lawyers with deep expertise in mechanical engineering, law, mathematics, analytics, physics, and engineering.

fullCycle.title: Full-cycle production facility
fullCycle.paragraph:
JSC Ocher Machine-Building Plant is one of the oldest industrial enterprises in the Urals. The plant combines in-house production capacity, engineering expertise, and quality control to deliver products demanded by the oil and gas, construction, and industrial sectors.

OMZ manufactures equipment and components for companies that value reliability, compliance with standards, stable deliveries, and the ability to produce items to specific technical requirements.
fullCycle.imageAlt: 石油开采设备车间生产线

crane.title: 8 台起重机
crane.description: 起重能力达 10 吨的桥式起重机

metal-structures.title: 先进设备
metal-structures.description: 激光切割设备可直接接收工艺卡任务，有助于降低钢材消耗。等离子切割设备、多种管径去毛刺机床以及数控折弯和卷板设备，可高精度生产各类零件。

metal-structures.title: 耐腐蚀产品
metal-structures.description: 成品采用现代涂层进行防腐保护。表面在抛丸室中处理，涂料由无气喷涂设备施加。

metal-structures.title: 无损检测
metal-structures.description: 采用认证设备和专业人员检测焊缝。具备冷却塔、跨间结构、桅杆、工艺厂房和管道支架的制造经验。

metal-structures.title: 重型起重机
metal-structures.description: 车间安装8台起重量达10吨的桥式起重机。

oilfield-equipment.title: 专业团队
oilfield-equipment.description: 车间拥有300余名高技能专业人员。生产线可配置为批量或定制生产任意复杂度的产品。

oilfield-equipment.title: 完整生产周期
oilfield-equipment.description: 从坯料和热处理到试验和标记，所有工序均在厂区完成，无需外包。

oilfield-equipment.title: 符合 API 和 GOST
oilfield-equipment.description: 产品经进货、工序和出厂检验。向客户提供符合性文件和证书。

oilfield-equipment.title: 物流与交期
oilfield-equipment.description: 完善的配货和发运体系可确保向偏远油田按时交货。

building-structures.title: 品种齐全
building-structures.description: 对拉螺杆、楔形锁和棘轮锁、螺母、斜撑、支柱及模板元件——同一车间内一应俱全。

building-structures.title: 仓库库存
building-structures.description: 常备畅销品种，可快速发运至施工现场。

building-structures.title: 订单灵活
building-structures.description: 按标准图和定制图加工，按项目配套批次。

building-structures.title: 质量控制
building-structures.description: 每批产品均检验几何尺寸和强度特性。

metal.title: 金属结构车间
metal.cta: OMZ 是一个重视劳动、助力成长的团队。加入我们！

history.title: 公司历史
history.intro: 了解我们工厂引人入胜的历史、走过的道路以及经历的转型阶段
history.placeholder: {year} 年的历史资料正在准备发布。

entry1757.p1: 24 岁时，亚历山大·谢尔盖耶维奇·斯特罗加诺夫承担起发展家族事业的责任
entry1757.p2: 此时继承人已接受良好教育，包括系统学习欧洲工业企业。1746 年，亚历山大·谢尔盖耶维奇的伯父亚历山大·格里戈里耶维奇·斯特罗加诺夫建造了南卡姆斯克工厂
entry1757.p3: 借鉴这一成功经验，亚历山大·谢尔盖耶维奇接受了管理员费奥多尔·沃ulin 的建议，决定在森林丰富的奥切尔地区建厂。锻锤厂的炼铁炉需要大量木炭。接下来只需在这片广阔领地的偏远角落建立一座新的工厂城镇

safetyHotline.title: 安全热线
safetyHotline.reviewNote: 每份报告都将认真审查；如有依据，将开展相应调查。

p1.part1: 为维持对奥切尔机械制造厂的高度信任，
p1.part2: 遵守国际商业道德标准，并作为企业发现和预防各类违规及滥用行为（包括腐败、欺诈、滥用职权等）政策的一部分
p1.part3: 公司在企业内部设立了「安全热线」。

p2.part2: 您可以方便地（包括匿名）举报盗窃、侵吞、欺诈、贿赂、商业贿赂和利益冲突，
p2.part3: 以及其他令您担忧的负面事件。

notices.anonymity: 向提供信息者保证完全匿名和保密。
notices.reward: 若可靠信息有助于防止企业受损，将在保密条件下提供金钱奖励。
